parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- COMMENT DATA
  c.id                         AS comment_id,
  c.body                       AS comment_body,
  CONVERT_TZ(c.created_at, '+00:00', '+05:30')                 AS comment_created_at,
  c.commentor_id               AS commented_by_id,

  commenter.firstname          AS commented_by_firstname,
  commenter.lastname           AS commented_by_lastname,
  commenter.email              AS commented_by_email,

  -- ISSUE FULL DATA
  i.*,
  i.id                         AS issue_id,
  i.title                      AS issue_title,
  i.created_at                 AS issue_created_at,
  i.end_date                   AS issue_end_date,
  i.status                     AS issue_status,
  i.priority                   AS issue_priority,

  -- PROJECT
  pm.id                        AS project_id,
  pm.title                     AS project_title,

  -- ISSUE OWNER
  io.email                     AS issue_owner_email,
  io.firstname                 AS issue_owner_firstname,
  io.lastname                  AS issue_owner_lastname,

  -- PROJECT MANAGER
  pmo.email                    AS project_manager_email,
  pmo.firstname                AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname                  AS project_manager_lastname,

  -- CREATED BY
  cb.firstname                 AS created_by_firstname,
  cb.lastname                  AS created_by_lastname,

  -- MILESTONE
  m.id                         AS milestone_id,
  m.title                      AS milestone_title,

  -- TASK INFO
  t.id                         AS task_id,
  t.title                      AS task_title,

  -- MENTIONED USER
  u.id                         AS mentioned_user_id,
  u.firstname                  AS mentioned_user_firstname,
  u.lastname                   AS mentioned_user_lastname,
  u.email                      AS mentioned_user_email

FROM comments c

-- ISSUE
JOIN issues i
  ON i.id = c.commentable_id
 AND c.commentable_type = 'Issue'

-- ISSUE OWNER
JOIN spree_users io
  ON io.id = i.responsible_person_id

-- PROJECT
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = i.project_management_id

-- PROJECT MANAGER
JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

-- CREATED BY
LEFT JOIN spree_users cb
  ON cb.id = i.created_by_id

-- COMMENTER
LEFT JOIN spree_users commenter
  ON commenter.id = c.commentor_id

-- MILESTONE (from issue)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = i.milestone_id

-- TASK (from issue)
LEFT JOIN task_managements t
  ON t.id = i.task_management_id

-- MENTIONED USERS
LEFT JOIN spree_users u
  ON c.body REGEXP CONCAT('\\@\\[.*\\]\\(', u.id, '\\)')

WHERE
  c.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 30 MINUTE;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.subject: =New Issue Logged: {{$json.issue_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.issue_owner_firstname}} {{$json.issue_owner_lastname}},

An issue has been logged in the system and assigned for review and resolution.

Issue Details

Issue Title {{$json.issue_title}}
Description {{$json.description}}
Issue Type {{$json.issue_type}}
Priority {{$json.issue_priority}}
Current Status {{$json.issue_status}}
Issue Created On {{$json.created_at}}
Issue End On {{$json.end_date || 'N/A'}}
Project Title {{$json.project_title}}
Milestone Title {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Linked Task {{$json.task_title || 'N/A'}})
Created By {{$json.created_by_firstname}} {{$json.created_by_lastname}}
Issue Link View Issue Details

Please review the issue details and initiate corrective action as appropriate.

Regards,
Issue & Quality Management System

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM comments ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.subject: =New Comment Added on Issue: {{$json.issue_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.recipient_firstname}} {{$json.recipient_lastname}},

A new comment has been added to the issue {{$json.issue_title}} for your review.

Comment Details

Issue Title {{$json.issue_title}}
Issue Created On {{$json.issue_created_at}}
Issue End On {{$json.issue_end_date || 'N/A'}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Linked Task {{$json.task_title || 'N/A'}}
Project {{$json.project_title}}
Commented By {{$json.commented_by_firstname}} {{$json.commented_by_lastname}}
Comment “{{$json.comment_body}}”
Issue URL View Issue

Please review and respond if any action is required.

Regards,
Issue Collaboration System
